title: Linde (LIN) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: Linde (LIN) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Linde to Increase Green Hydrogen Production in California
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 31, 2023 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) announced today plans to increase its green hydrogen production capacity in Ontario, California, in response to growing demand from the mobility market. Linde will build, own and operate the first of several planned five-megawatt PEM (proton exchange membrane) electrolyzers to increase its hydrogen capacity.

title: Linde plc: Linde Board Elects Hugh Grant as New Director
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 24, 2023 / Linde plc (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) today announced that its Board of Directors has elected Hugh Grant as a new director of Linde plc, effective January 23, 2023. Grant will serve on the Nomination and Governance and the Human Capital committees.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD Methodology - Slow And Steady
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: Why Linde (LIN) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: Linde (LIN) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: Here's Why Linde (LIN) is a Strong Growth Stock
text: Whether you're a value, growth, or momentum investor, finding strong stocks becomes easier with the Zacks Style Scores, a top feature of the Zacks Premium research service.

title: L'Air Liquide Vs. Linde: Which Is The More Attractive For Long-Term Investors Right Now?
text: L'Air Liquide and Linde are two of the largest industrial gas companies in the world, with attractive industry dynamics, high profit margins, and excellent returns on capital. Both companies have been investing in hydrogen infrastructure which is expected to become a significant growth area for both companies.

title: Linde Shareholders Approve Proposal to Delist from Frankfurt Stock Exchange
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 18, 2023 / Linde plc (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) today announced its shareholders have approved the company's proposal for an intercompany reorganization that will result in the delisting of its ordinary shares from the Frankfurt Stock Exchange. Preliminary voting results indicate that at least approximately 93% of the votes cast on each of the delisting proposals were cast in favor at the Court Meeting and the Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders held today.

title: Linde Receives Terra Carta Seal for its Commitment to a Sustainable Future
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 17, 2023 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) announced today it has been awarded the Sustainable Market Initiative's Terra Carta Seal. The Terra Carta Seal, launched at COP26 by HM King Charles III when he was Prince of Wales, recognizes global companies which are driving innovation and demonstrating their commitment to creating sustainable markets.

title: Great Lakes Clean Hydrogen Coalition Encouraged to Submit Full Application by U.S. Department of Energy
text: TOLEDO, Ohio , Jan. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- The Great Lakes Clean Hydrogen coalition (GLCH) today announced it has received encouragement from the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) to proceed with the development and submittal of their full hydrogen hub application.  The coalition, which is led by Linde (NYSE: LIN; FWB: LIN), Energy Harbor, Cleveland-Cliffs Inc. (NYSE: CLF), GE Aerospace and the University of Toledo, along with the Glass Manufacturing Industry Council (GMIC), was among 79 organizations submitting concept papers to the DOE for development consideration.

title: Linde (LIN) Signs Deal to Acquire Remaining Stake in nexAir
text: The acquisition aligns with Linde's (LIN) strategy to increase network density and reinvest in opportunities.

title: Linde Buys Out Stake in One of the Largest U.S. Independent Packaged Gas Distributors
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 6, 2022 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) announced today it has acquired the remaining interests in nexAir, LLC, one of the largest independent packaged gas distributors in the United States with 2022 sales of approximately $400 million. Linde's wholly owned subsidiary Linde Gas & Equipment Inc. (LG&E) has held a minority interest in nexAir since 2012.

title: Linde Announces Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings and Conference Call Schedule
text: WOKING, UK / ACCESSWIRE / January 5, 2023 / Linde (NYSE:LIN)(FWB:LIN) will release its fourth quarter 2022 financial results on Tuesday, February 7, 2023, at 06:00 EST/midday CET. The Company will host and webcast its conference call at 09:00 EST/15:00 CET, which will be available to the public and the media in listen-only mode.
